tools.name: context

tools.description:
Generate, list, and export ECDSA-P256 agent keys used to sign AP2 mandates.

Keys are stored under the platform config directory:
  macOS:  ~/Library/Application Support/ap2-pp-cli/keys/
  Linux:  ~/.config/ap2-pp-cli/keys/

Each key pair consists of:
  agent-<uuid>.pem   private key (PKCS#8 PEM, mode 0600)
  agent-<uuid>.pub   public key  (PKIX PEM,   mode 0644)

  keys generate                          generate a new keypair
  keys list                              list all stored keys
  keys export --id <agent-id>            export a key (default: PEM)
  keys export --id <agent-id> --format jwk   export as JWK

compact.description: Return only key fields (id, name, status, timestamps) for minimal token usage (default: false)

csv.description: Output as CSV (table and array responses) (default: false)

data-source.description: Data source for read commands: auto (live with local fallback), live (API only), local (synced data only) (default: auto)

deliver.description: Route output to a sink: stdout (default), file:<path>, webhook:<url>

human-friendly.description: Enable colored output and rich formatting (default: false)

no-input.description: Disable all interactive prompts (for CI/agents) (default: false)

profile.description: Apply values from a saved profile (see 'ap2-pp-cli profile list')

quiet.description: Bare output, one value per line (default: false)

rate-limit.description: Max requests per second (0 to disable) (default: 0)

select.description: Comma-separated fields to include in output (e.g. --select id,name,status)

yes.description: Skip confirmation prompts (for agents and scripts) (default: false)

tools.description:
sign reads an unsigned AP2 FinalizationEnvelope (JSON) from a file or stdin,
signs all three mandates (intent, cart, payment) with the specified ECDSA-P256 agent key,
and writes the signed envelope to stdout.

Key selection:
  - --key-id <agent-id>  use this specific key
  - (no flag)            auto-select if exactly one key exists; error if 0 or >1

Subject:
  - --subject <s>        set envelope.Subject to this value
  - (no flag)            if envelope.Subject is empty, default to the key's AgentID

Exit codes:
  0  signed envelope written to stdout
  1  signing error
  2  usage error (no key, ambiguous key, bad input)

compact.description: Return only key fields (id, name, status, timestamps) for minimal token usage (default: false)

csv.description: Output as CSV (table and array responses) (default: false)

data-source.description: Data source for read commands: auto (live with local fallback), live (API only), local (synced data only) (default: auto)

deliver.description: Route output to a sink: stdout (default), file:<path>, webhook:<url>

envelope.description: Envelope file path, or "-" to read from stdin (default: -)

human-friendly.description: Enable colored output and rich formatting (default: false)

key-id.description: Agent key ID to sign with (e.g. agent-<uuid>); auto-selected if omitted and only one key exists

no-input.description: Disable all interactive prompts (for CI/agents) (default: false)

profile.description: Apply values from a saved profile (see 'ap2-pp-cli profile list')

quiet.description: Bare output, one value per line (default: false)

rate-limit.description: Max requests per second (0 to disable) (default: 0)

select.description: Comma-separated fields to include in output (e.g. --select id,name,status)

subject.description: Override envelope.Subject (defaults to the signing key's AgentID if envelope.Subject is empty)

yes.description: Skip confirmation prompts (for agents and scripts) (default: false)

tools.name: mandate_sign

tools.description:
verify reads a signed AP2 FinalizationEnvelope (JSON) from a file or stdin
and checks:
  1. body_hash integrity (SHA-256 of body bytes matches stored hash)
  2. ECDSA signature validity for each mandate
  3. cross-mandate chain references (intent→cart→payment)
  4. amount consistency (payment.amount_cents == cart.subtotal_cents)
  5. expiry (intent_mandate.expires_at must be in the future)

Exit codes:
  0  all checks passed
  1  verification failed (typed error code printed to stderr)
  2  usage error

args.description: Additional positional arguments or raw CLI flags to append to the command.

compact.description: Return only key fields (id, name, status, timestamps) for minimal token usage (default: false)

csv.description: Output as CSV (table and array responses) (default: false)

deliver.description: Route output to a sink: stdout (default), file:<path>, webhook:<url>

human-friendly.description: Enable colored output and rich formatting (default: false)

no-input.description: Disable all interactive prompts (for CI/agents) (default: false)

no-sig-check.description: Skip ECDSA signature verification (structural checks only) (default: false)

tools.name: mandate_verify

tools.description:
authorize reads a signed AP2 FinalizationEnvelope and calls the merchant's
complete_checkout MCP endpoint. Default mode is --sandbox, which builds and
prints the would-be request without making any network call.

Exit codes:
  0  authorized (sandbox_authorized in sandbox mode)
  1  verification or authorization failure
  2  usage error

envelope.description: Path to signed FinalizationEnvelope JSON file, or - for stdin (default: -)

human-friendly.description: Enable colored output and rich formatting (default: false)

live.description: Live mode: POST to merchant's complete_checkout endpoint (requires --token) (default: false)

merchant-mcp-url.description: Merchant MCP endpoint URL (derived from envelope.checkout_url if omitted)

no-input.description: Disable all interactive prompts (for CI/agents) (default: false)

profile.description: Apply values from a saved profile (see 'ap2-pp-cli profile list')
